claim: WHO reports that over 1 billion people experience catastrophic health expenditure annually, with 90 percent in LMICs where health-insurance coverage is below 30 percent.

source.title: Tracking universal health coverage: 2023 global monitoring report

method: Reviewed WHO UHC monitoring report, financial-protection indicators, and insurance-coverage data.
limitations: Insurance-coverage data depends on household surveys.

Source URL repaired June 2026 after the original rotted; the report confirms >1 billion people face catastrophic health spending, but the '90 percent in LMICs' share should be reconfirmed against the report.
